sub_modules.harris_sobel3x3: Combinational Sobel 3x3 gradient operator producing signed X and Y gradients.
sub_modules.harris_gradient_products: Combinational gradient product stage producing Ix squared, Iy squared, and IxIy.
sub_modules.harris_gaussian_passthrough: Combinational smoothing placeholder preserving product values while maintaining an independent stencil-stage boundary.
sub_modules.harris_response: Combinational fixed-point Harris response calculation using determinant, trace squared, and configurable k.
sub_modules.harris_threshold: Combinational binary corner decision comparing signed response against threshold.
